reason: Verified that the agent can successfully open a browser, navigate to a URL, extract the page title, and respond with "Example Domain" in the chat interface.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Super Agent interface with three agents listed in the sidebar.
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260424-232948-vzlf" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent's chat interface showing "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" task.
Step 3: Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message successfully sent and agent began processing.
Step 4: Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed the task in 7 seconds, executing two tool calls: "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Page Snapshot".
Step 5: Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — The agent's response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." which confirms successful page navigation and title extraction.
